speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ m forming a music band .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you already know how to play an instrument ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Uh ... Yeah ! I ’ Ve told you a thousand times that I ’ m learning to play the drums . Now that I know how to play well , I would like to form a rock band .

speaker: speaker2
text: Aside from yourself , who are the other members of the band ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We have a guy who plays guitar , and another who plays bass . Although we still haven ’ t found anyone to be our singer . You told me that you had some musical talent , right ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Perfect . So you can audition this weekend here at my house .

speaker: speaker2
text: Great ! Wait here ? You don ’ t have enough room for the amplifiers , microphones or even your drums ! By the way where do you keep them or practice ?
